title: SNAP restrictions could change what shoppers buy — and food giants are watching
summary: SNAP food restrictions are expanding to more states and pressuring major food and beverage companies as consumers reduce spending on less healthy items like soda, candy, and processed foods. This shift reflects growing policy efforts to influence dietary choices through benefit restrictions.
content: SNAP food restrictions are spreading to more states, pressuring major food and beverage as consumers shift spending away from soda, candy and processed foods.

zh.title: SNAP限制可能改变购物者的购买行为——食品巨头正在关注
zh.summary: SNAP食品限制正在扩展到更多州，并向主要食品和饮料公司施压，因为消费者减少了对汽水、糖果和加工食品等不健康食品的支出。这一转变反映了通过福利限制来影响饮食选择的不断增长的政策努力。

title: Google shake-up highlights how human brains may be the scarcest AI resource of all
summary: Despite growth in AI research talent, the experience required to build and scale AI systems remains in short supply, as highlighted by Google's recent restructuring. This talent scarcity is becoming a critical bottleneck in AI development across the industry.
content: Despite a growing pool of research talent, not many have the experience of building and scaling AI, experts say.

zh.title: 谷歌重组凸显人才可能是最稀缺的人工智能资源
zh.summary: 尽管人工智能研究人才在增长，但构建和扩展人工智能系统所需的经验仍然短缺，这在谷歌最近的重组中得到了强调。这种人才短缺正在成为整个行业人工智能开发的关键瓶颈。

title: Kennedy Center says it isn't required to reschedule shows after judge blocks 2-year closure
summary: A court decision has blocked the Kennedy Center's planned two-year closure for renovations, and the institution's lawyers assert they can maintain operations while proceeding with improvements after July 5. The legal ruling may allow the venue to remain partially operational during renovations.
content: Kennedy Center lawyers said the institution plans to "maintain an operational model" after July 5, when it initially was scheduled to shutter for renovations.

zh.title: 肯尼迪中心表示在法官阻止两年关闭后无需重新安排演出
zh.summary: 法院决定已阻止肯尼迪中心计划的两年翻新关闭，该机构的律师声称他们可以在7月5日之后进行改进的同时保持运营。这一法律裁决可能允许该场地在翻新期间保持部分运营。

title: Israeli strikes kill 10 in Lebanon hours after ceasefire
summary: Israeli military strikes killed at least 10 people across Lebanon's Nabatieh region overnight and into Saturday morning, occurring shortly after a ceasefire was announced. The attacks raise immediate questions about ceasefire implementation and stability in the region.
content: Lebanese state news agency NNA said Israeli warplanes and drones carried out a series of strikes across the Nabatieh area overnight and into Saturday morning.

zh.title: 以色列在停火后数小时内在黎巴嫩造成10人死亡
zh.summary: 以色列军事打击在周六上午前夜至清晨期间在黎巴嫩纳巴蒂耶地区造成至少10人死亡，发生在停火宣布后不久。这些攻击引起了对停火实施和该地区稳定性的直接质疑。

title: Money Box
summary: Civil service pensioners are experiencing further delays in receiving their pension payments, extending ongoing issues with the payment system. The delays continue to affect retirees dependent on these income sources.
content: Civil service pensioners face further delays to payments.

zh.title: 金钱箱
zh.summary: 公务员养老金领取者在领取养老金时遭遇进一步延误，延续了支付系统的持续问题。延误继续影响依赖这些收入来源的退休人员。

title: Goldman Sachs is betting that a recent merger will drive sharp gains for this travel stock
summary: Goldman Sachs upgraded an airline stock to buy from neutral this week, indicating confidence that a recent merger will deliver significant gains. The bank's upgraded outlook suggests optimism about the airline's post-merger performance.
content: The bank this week upgraded the airline to buy from neutral.

zh.title: 高盛押注最近的并购将带动这只旅游股票大幅上涨
zh.summary: 高盛本周将一只航空股从中立升级为买入，表明对最近并购将实现重大收益的信心。该银行升级后的前景表明对该航空公司并购后表现的乐观看法。

title: Five top tech stocks with major upside, Bank of America says
summary: Bank of America has identified five top technology stocks expected to deliver substantial upside as the second half of the year begins. The bank's analysis provides guidance for investors heading into a critical period for tech valuations.
content: Bank of America reveals its top tech stocks heading into the second half.

zh.title: 美国银行称五只顶级科技股具有重大上升空间
zh.summary: 美国银行已确定五只顶级科技股，预计在下半年开始时将带来实质性的上升机会。该银行的分析为投资者在科技估值的关键时期提供了指导。

title: Iran to lodge FIFA complaint over World Cup travel restrictions
summary: Iran's national team is lodging a complaint with FIFA over travel restrictions that force them to commute from Mexico to the United States for group matches due to visa uncertainties and regional conflict. The team's travel burden highlights ongoing geopolitical tensions affecting international sports.
content: The Iran team are commuting from their tournament base in co-host Mexico for their group games in the U.S. due to visa uncertainties and the war.

zh.title: 伊朗就世界杯旅行限制向国际足联提出投诉
zh.summary: 伊朗国家队因签证不确定性和地区冲突，对迫使他们在墨西哥和美国之间往返参加小组赛的旅行限制向国际足联提出投诉。该队的旅行负担突显了影响国际体育的持续地缘政治紧张局势。

title: Massive bonuses for South Korea's chip workers puts central bank on inflation alert
summary: South Korean chip industry workers are receiving substantial bonuses worth millions of won, triggering inflation concerns at the Bank of Korea. The central bank has warned that these large payouts could exert upward pressure on inflation across the economy.
content: Workers from tech industries receive bonus worth millions of won, prompting the Bank of Korea to warn of the upward pressure to inflation.

zh.title: 韩国芯片工人巨额奖金引发央行通胀警报
zh.summary: 韩国芯片产业工人正获得价值数百万韩元的巨额奖金，引发韩国央行的通胀担忧。央行警告称，这些大额支出可能对整个经济的通胀构成上升压力。

title: My mother was co-owner of my late grandmother’s bank account. Should she share the money with her siblings?
summary: A mother who co-owns her late mother's bank account faces questions about whether she must share the funds with her siblings, as the will specifies the estate should be divided equally among all children. The situation highlights the legal complexity between co-ownership rights and inheritance obligations.
content: “The will stated that the estate was to be divided equally among her children.”

zh.title: 我的母亲是已故祖母银行账户的共同所有人。她应该与兄弟姐妹分享这笔钱吗?
zh.summary: 一位母亲作为已故母亲银行账户的共同所有人,面临着是否必须与兄弟姐妹分享资金的问题,因为遗嘱规定遗产应该在所有孩子之间平等分配。这种情况突显了共同所有权和继承义务之间的法律复杂性。
